title: Watch: Trump slams Iran over peace deal leaks| Above the Fold| 12.06.2026
description: Could West Asia be heading towards a diplomatic breakthrough? In this episode, we unpack the reported draft agreement between Iran and the U.S. and what it could mean for the future of the conflict. We also look at the Supreme Court’s dismissal of Meenakshi Natarajan’s plea over her rejected Rajya Sabha nomination, and more.
